# harvester_kubeovn_qos_policy (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_kubeovn_qos_policy" "example" {
  name = "example-qos"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Read-Only

- `bandwidth_limit_rules` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bandwidth_limit_rules))
- `binding_type` (String)
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `message` (String)
- `shared` (Boolean)
- `state` (String)
- `status_binding_type` (String)
- `status_shared` (Boolean)
- `tags` (Map of String)
